jp-lesson.title: コンビニで食べ物を買う

jp-sprite.art: small Japanese convenience store front with glass doors
simple Japan map shape with red sun marker
small shop storefront with clear entrance
convenience store aisle with simple shelves
friendly convenience store clerk behind counter
small group of packaged convenience store foods
small group of bottles and cartons
rice ball and drink breakfast set
triangular rice ball with black seaweed wrap
paper coffee cup with dark coffee surface
clear iced coffee cup with ice
front of convenience store coffee machine
small paper cup with tiny size cue
large paper cup with big size cue
simple plastic shopping bag with handles
small price tag with yen symbol
shopping basket with convenience store items
hand paying for item at register
hand choosing one rice ball from shelf
card and cash near payment terminal
coffee flowing from machine into cup
hand carefully holding hot coffee cup
hand showing reusable bag to clerk
bento warming in microwave with steam
two rice balls side by side
hand placing item into reusable bag

jp-section.title: コンビニで食べ物を買う

jp-token.meaning: so you do not mistake it

jp-token.reading: ふくろはごりようですか

jp-token.meaning: when you do not need it
I do not need a bag

jp-token.text: マイバッグがあります
jp-token.reading: まいばっぐがあります
いってもだいじょうぶ

jp-token.text: あたためなくていいとき
jp-token.reading: あたためなくていいとき
いいえ、だいじょうぶです

jp-token.text: くれることがあります
jp-token.reading: くれることがあります

jp-token.meaning: when you do not need it

jp-token.text: レシートはいりません
jp-token.reading: れしーとはいりません
jp-token.meaning: I do not need a receipt

jp-token.text: ありがとうございます
jp-token.reading: ありがとうございます

jp-image.alt: Illustration of a traveler entering a Japanese convenience store and choosing food
jp-image.title: コンビニで食べ物を選ぶ

jp-image.alt: Illustration of a convenience store coffee machine and breakfast items
jp-image.title: コンビニのコーヒー

jp-image.alt: Illustration of a convenience store checkout with a reusable bag and utensils
jp-image.title: レジで袋とはしを聞かれる場面
